name: Shodan Monitor
description: Internet intelligence platform providing real-time monitoring of internet-facing assets, banner grabbing, service detection, and vulnerability identification across the entire IPv4 space

actions.name: Search Hosts
actions.description: Search the Shodan database for internet-facing hosts matching query filters

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Shodan search query with optional filters (e.g., 'apache org:"Company Name"')

parameters.name: facets
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of facets for aggregation (e.g., 'port,country')

parameters.name: minify
parameters.description: Return only summary information for each result

actions.name: Get Host Details
actions.description: Retrieve all services, banners, and metadata found on a specific IP address

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IP address of the host to look up

parameters.name: history
parameters.description: Include historical data for the host

actions.name: Host Count
actions.description: Get the total number of hosts matching a search query without consuming query credits

parameters.name: facets
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of facets for aggregation

actions.name: List Scan Protocols
actions.description: Retrieve all protocols that can be used when launching an internet scan

actions.name: Request Scan
actions.description: Request Shodan to scan a specific IP or network CIDR on demand

parameters.name: ips
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of IPs or CIDRs to scan (e.g., '1.1.1.1,8.8.8.0/24')

actions.name: Search Exploits
actions.description: Search for known exploits across multiple databases including CVE and Metasploit

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Exploit search query (e.g., CVE ID or software name)

parameters.name: facets
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of facets for aggregation

actions.name: DNS Lookup
actions.description: Resolve domain names to IP addresses

parameters.name: hostnames
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of hostnames to resolve

actions.name: Reverse DNS Lookup
actions.description: Look up hostnames associated with IP addresses

parameters.name: ips
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of IP addresses for reverse lookup
